Obstructive Pulmonary Disease - Combined Medicare Medicaid Claims, First Ever Occurrence Date date - MM/DD/YYYY
 COPD_MEDICARE_EVER Chronic Obstructive Pulmonary Disease - Medicare Only Claims, First Ever Occurrence Date date - MM/DD/YYYY

 CHF_COMBINED Heart Failure - Combined Medicare Medicaid Claims 0 - Claims and FFS not met
1 - Claims met, not FFS
